title: External Agent Write API — Service Event Payload (v1.0)
description: Payload shape for envelope.event_type='service'. Routes to vehicle_observations with observation_kind='work_record', source slug 'shop'. Loose by design — agents add fields liberally; structure hardens in v1.1 once real submissions reveal the missing shape.

narrative.description: Free-form, agent-written description of what happened. No length cap beyond the JSONB column limit.

work_performed.description: Discrete actions completed in this session.

work_planned.description: Actions queued for a future session.

parts.description: Parts considered, ordered, or installed during this session.

decisions.description: Decisions made during the session. Captures intent, not just outcome.

condition_observations.description: Findings about vehicle condition discovered during the session. These are testimony — they will appear on the vehicle profile with the agent's attribution and confidence.

system.description: Vehicle subsystem (open enum — examples: top_end, bottom_end, fuel, ignition, cooling, brakes, electrical, suspension, drivetrain, body, interior).

shop_ref.description: Free-form shop or workspace identifier (e.g. 'NUKE LTD bay 2', 'home garage').
